items.name: EmuTOS
items.notes: Open-source TOS-compatible firmware for ST, TT, and Falcon-class machines.

items.name: FreeMiNT + XaAES
items.license: Project-hosted; verify package-level licenses in the release you bundle
items.notes: Kernel plus AES desktop environment available from the FreeMiNT project.

items.name: TeraDesk
items.notes: Open desktop/file manager for Atari ST through Falcon-class systems.

items.name: fVDI
items.license: Project-hosted; AFROS describes it as part of a GPL-redistributable stack
items.notes: Free VDI replacement commonly paired with FreeMiNT/XaAES/TeraDesk.

items.name: AFROS
items.license: GPL redistributable stack per project page
items.notes: Preassembled free Atari-compatible operating-system stack built from EmuTOS, FreeMiNT, fVDI, XaAES, and TeraDesk.

items.name: NetSurf Atari
items.notes: Open-source browser with official Atari builds published by the NetSurf project CI.

items.name: QED
items.license: Project-hosted; verify repository/license before bundling binaries
items.notes: Text editor maintained in the FreeMiNT project space.

items.name: TosWin2
items.license: Project-hosted; verify repository/license before bundling binaries
items.notes: Terminal emulator for FreeMiNT maintained in the FreeMiNT project space.

items.name: COPS
items.license: Project-hosted; verify repository/license before bundling binaries
items.notes: CPX/control-panel host replacing XCONTROL.ACC for newer Atari setups.

items.name: HighWire
items.license: Source-available in the FreeMiNT project space; verify exact redistribution terms before bundling
items.notes: Lightweight GEM browser listed by the FreeMiNT project as an inactive but hosted project.

items.name: FreeMiNT OS Distro
items.license: Mixed stack; repository notes a demo HDDRIVER component
items.notes: Bootable Falcon/TT distribution with FreeMiNT, XaAES, TeraDesk, NetSurf, HighWire, Links, and Unix tools. Treat as a convenience distro, not a clean bundle candidate.

items.name: FastBasic
items.notes: Open-source Atari 8-bit BASIC with ATR and XEX outputs available from project releases.
